info.title: MapQuest API
info.description: MapQuest provides a suite of mapping APIs including geocoding, directions, static maps, search ahead, place search, and traffic data. These APIs enable address geocoding, route calculation, map image generation, predictive search, and real-time traffic information.

tags.name: Geocoding
tags.description: Forward and reverse geocoding of addresses and coordinates

tags.name: Batch Geocoding
tags.description: Batch and async batch geocoding operations

tags.name: Place Search
tags.description: Search for places, businesses, and points of interest

get.description: Convert a street address to geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude). Supports single-line and 5-box input formats.

parameters.name: thumbMaps
parameters.description: Whether to return thumbnail map URLs.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key.

403.description: Forbidden - API key does not have access.

post.description: Convert a street address to geographic coordinates using POST method.

get.description: Convert a latitude/longitude pair to a street address.

parameters.name: thumbMaps
parameters.description: Whether to return thumbnail map URLs.

post.description: Convert a latitude/longitude pair to a street address using POST.

get.description: Geocode up to 100 addresses in a single request.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Address(es) to geocode. Use multiple location parameters for batch.

post.description: Geocode up to 100 addresses in a single POST request.

get.description: Calculate a route between two or more locations with turn-by-turn narrative, distance, and time.

post.description: Calculate a route using POST method for complex requests.

get.description: Calculate an optimized route that reorders waypoints for the most efficient path.
Get multiple route alternatives between locations.

parameters.name: maxRoutes
parameters.description: Maximum number of alternate routes to return.

parameters.name: timeOverage
parameters.description: Maximum percentage of time overage for alternate routes.

post.description: Calculate distances and times between multiple locations in a matrix.

get.description: Retrieve the shape/geometry of a previously computed route.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session ID from a previous route request.

get.description: Generate a static map image with optional locations, routes, and overlays.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: Center of the map as latitude,longitude or address.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Map image dimensions as width,height in pixels.

get.description: Search for places, businesses, and points of interest around the world.
Spatially-aware predictive search engine for type-ahead functionality.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Center point as latitude,longitude for spatial bias.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Collection to search (e.g., address, adminArea, poi, category, franchise, airport).

apiKeyQuery.name: key
apiKeyQuery.description: MapQuest API key obtained from the developer portal.

mapUrl.description: URL to a thumbnail map of the location.

locations.description: Array of locations (first is origin, last is destination, middle are waypoints).

distance.description: Flat array of distances between locations.

time.description: Flat array of times (seconds) between locations.

collection.description: Type of result (address, adminArea, poi, etc.).
